The plugin version references are specific to Guilin (running this against frankfurt would fail)

Patch Set 2:

ok
open ticket to get the best procedure to simply release frankfurt xtesting dockers (not easy as from our jjb we triggers 5 different jjb (1 per dockers), then the self-release process cannot be used as such as we have 5 different jenkins reference, not one)
I hope I could have a simpel solution this week, then we could have frankfurt and master xtesting docker coming from Nexus..

it can of course

my question is just an integration question
as today we are using the same xtesting tests for master and frankfurt
so a change in master will be taken into account in our frankfurt daily CI
the right way to fix that is to create frankfurt xtesting dockers..it is not as trivial as doing that on gitlab.com, I need to review the build process job.

But no worry I will merge
